name: chase-nav
description: Closed-loop VLA navigation: the dog must route AROUND rubble that blocks the straight line to each of three survivor spheres, and signal each when it comes into view. Flat field (cadenza-lab slopes flip the go1). Driven tick-by-tick by SmolVLA->LoRA reading the live coordinates — no hardcoded plan.

actions.signal_sphere: Rescue-dog to base: survivor-marker sphere in sight — holding to flag it.

scene._comment_axes: cadenza forward is -X. Spawn at origin heads into negative X along the y~0 corridor. Three spheres sit ~on the centre-line, well spaced; ONE rubble box is offset to alternating sides of each leg, close enough to the path that the closed-loop policy must steer around it (with ~0.5m berth) but not a dead-centre block that would livelock a memoryless reactive policy. Flat ground.

phases.name: navigate
phases.goal_prompt: navigate the debris field, steering around the rubble, and bring each survivor sphere into view
